title: elatine minima
intro: Elatine minima, also known as small waterwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Elatinaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elatine minima include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
